CustomField.formula: '&queryid=[QuoteLineRenewal]0Q_026MAQ975089,[RenewalLetter]0Q_030MAQ331479,[StaticRenewal]0Q_174MAQ153500,[SelectRenewal]0Q_175MAQ769671' & '&defaultPDF=1' & '&templateid=0T_071MAQ089302' & "&OFN=" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( "Renewal Invoice for " & Account_Name__c & " - " & TEXT(TODAY()), " ", "%20"), "&", "%26"), "#", "%23"), "+", "%2B"), "?", "%3F") & '&qmode=SendEmail' & '&emailtoid=' & Renewal_Quote__r.Invoicing_Contact__c & '&congaemailtemplateid=0E_003EAU884391' & '&APIMODE=1&DS7=11&SC1=SalesforceFile&SC0=1'
CustomField.label: Conga URL Base
